scope_summary: Verified installed Hermes Feishu loop skills are enabled, sent exactly one non-sensitive Feishu smoke notification, observed the confirmation phrase through sanitized gateway-log counts, and wrote the local private review gate.
skill_check_method: hermes skills list reported both local skills as enabled; no Hermes restart was performed
gateway_status_public_summary: status command returned successfully; raw status output was not published
feishu_message_public_summary: Stage 2D.2B smoke message requested the confirmation phrase and stated that final trading is manual.
confirmation_observation_method: sanitized gateway-log count found reply-like exact confirmation matches; raw log lines were not published
final_trading_notice: Final trading is manually decided by the user. This system does not automatically place orders.
